name: Splunk Attack Analyzer MCP Tools
description: Read-only MCP tools for Splunk Attack Analyzer platform integration readiness.
author: splunk-attack-analyzer-setup skill

tools.name: saa_app_health
tools.title: Attack Analyzer App Health
tools.description: Check Splunk Attack Analyzer add-on and dashboard app installation state.
tools.spl: | rest /services/apps/local count=0 | search title=Splunk_TA_SAA OR title=Splunk_App_SAA | table title label version disabled visible configured state | sort title

tools.name: saa_index_state
tools.title: Attack Analyzer Index State
tools.description: Check the saa index used by Splunk Attack Analyzer data ingestion.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/indexes count=0 | search title=saa | table title disabled datatype totalEventCount currentDBSizeMB maxTotalDataSizeMB splunk_server

tools.name: saa_macro_state
tools.title: Attack Analyzer Macro State
tools.description: Read the saa_indexes macro definition used by the dashboard app.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/configs/conf-macros count=0 | search title=saa_indexes | table title definition disabled eai:acl.app eai:acl.owner

tools.name: saa_enabled_inputs
tools.title: Attack Analyzer Enabled Inputs
tools.description: List enabled Splunk Attack Analyzer add-on inputs visible through REST.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/data/inputs/all count=0 | search eai:acl.app=Splunk_TA_SAA | table title eai:acl.app disabled index sourcetype interval | sort title

tools.name: saa_recent_data
tools.title: Attack Analyzer Recent Data
tools.description: Summarize recent SAA events by sourcetype and host.
tools.spl: | tstats count latest(_time) as latest where index=saa by index sourcetype host | eval latest=strftime(latest,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | sort -count
